Body.Content:
Drafting emails is faster and easier with Quick Parts, now available for Outlook for Windows and web. Quick Parts are saved email snippets that can be reused when composing new messages, making it easy to assemble messages with reusable parts. #newoutlookforwindows

GA date: February CY2026

message.Title: Outlook: Draft emails using saved email snippets with Quick Parts for Outlook for Windows and web
